case_title: DOROTHY MAE WILLIAMS VS. BEATRIZ AUDRY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, DOROTHY MAE AS TO DEFENDANT AUDRY, BEATRIZ AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
